objectives: Explain core DevOps principles and how they map to modern delivery workflows
Identify how version control, automation, and infrastructure practices fit together in a DevOps lifecycle
learning_path.title: DevOps Foundations and Workflow Overview

objectives: Create and manage repositories using common Git workflows
Use branching, merging, and pull/merge request practices to support team collaboration
learning_path.title: Version Control Fundamentals with Git

objectives: Navigate Linux systems and manage users, permissions, and services
Troubleshoot common system issues using standard Linux tools and logs
learning_path.title: Linux Administration Essentials for DevOps

objectives: Write Bash scripts to automate repeatable operational tasks
Use variables, conditionals, loops, and exit codes to build reliable scripts
learning_path.title: Bash Scripting for Automation

objectives: Build Docker images and run containers with appropriate networking and storage options
Apply best practices for image layering, tagging, and container lifecycle management
learning_path.title: Containers with Docker: Build, Run, and Ship

objectives: Design a CI/CD pipeline with stages, artifacts, and environment promotion
Implement pipeline triggers and approvals using common CI/CD patterns
learning_path.title: CI/CD Pipelines: Automating Build, Test, and Deploy

objectives: Compare core services and shared concepts across major cloud platforms
Operate common cloud resources with an emphasis on reliability and cost awareness
learning_path.title: Cloud Platforms Core Concepts and Operations

objectives: Author Terraform configurations to provision and update infrastructure safely
Use state management and modular patterns to support reusable infrastructure
learning_path.title: Infrastructure as Code with Terraform

objectives: Create Ansible inventories and playbooks to enforce desired system configuration
Apply idempotent automation patterns for repeatable server provisioning
learning_path.title: Configuration Management with Ansible

objectives: Deploy containerized applications to Kubernetes using core workload primitives
Understand scheduling, services, and basic operational troubleshooting
learning_path.title: Kubernetes Fundamentals: Deploying and Operating Workloads

objectives: Instrument and collect metrics to monitor system and application health
Create dashboards and alerts that support actionable incident response
learning_path.title: Monitoring and Alerting with Prometheus and Grafana

objectives: Centralize logs and build queries to investigate incidents and performance issues
Design log pipelines and retention strategies aligned with operational needs
learning_path.title: Logging and Observability with ELK/EFK/OpenSearch

objectives: Manage secrets lifecycle including storage, access, rotation, and auditing
Integrate secrets retrieval into automation and deployment workflows
learning_path.title: Secrets Management with Vault and KMS Concepts

objectives: Apply IAM principles and least-privilege access patterns across environments
Integrate vulnerability scanning into delivery workflows and remediation cycles
learning_path.title: Security Hardening and DevSecOps Practices

objectives: Write JavaScript scripts to automate common DevOps tasks and integrations
Structure small utilities for maintainability and safe execution in pipelines
learning_path.title: JavaScript for DevOps Automation and Tooling

matched_occupation.description: Cloud DevOps engineers implement and manage continuous software delivery systems and methodologies. This includes managing and configuring code repositories, build services, automated testing, and deployment mechanisms. For cloud-based workloads, a Cloud DevOps Engineer define and deploy infrastructure as code, automating test and development environments. They can define and configure automated disaster recovery solutions that meet business objectives.
matched_occupation.label: cloud DevOps engineer
